question: Does event-specific dynamic PWV improve CSI after radar and the static PWV geographic prior are held equal?

shared_input.optimization: same fit days, epochs, learning rate, weight decay, positive weights, and calibration-day protocol

dynamic_only_channels: three-hour mean event-level scalar PWV departure
trained_variants: radar plus the same static climatology and dynamic PWV residuals
same_checkpoint_controls: spatially shifted anomaly channels with static climatology unchanged
static-only input through the trained dynamic checkpoint

promotion_rule.required: aligned dynamic PWV must improve all-window CSI by at least 0.003 and average precision by more than zero over the separately trained static control and the cross-event, anomaly-shift, and same-checkpoint-static controls in at least three of four tasks
promotion_rule.safety: no task may lose more than 0.003 CSI against the separately trained static-climatology control
